{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-p6rv-2qpm-fwvg. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
An argument parsing error in the kill utility of uutils coreutils incorrectly interprets kill -1 as a request to send the default signal (SIGTERM) to PID -1. Sending a signal to PID -1 causes the kernel to terminate all processes visible to the caller, potentially leading to a system crash or massive process termination. This differs from GNU coreutils, which correctly recognizes -1 as a signal number in this context and would instead report a missing PID argument.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gpcg-h6x2-c26p", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:49:15Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpcg-h6x2-c26p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gpcg-h6x2-c26p"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35369", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/9700", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.6.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/2d3aebce6712841bc08b9b94e9078be50a25fc10", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpcg-h6x2-c26p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has an Improper Input Validation issue", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:55:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gpcg-h6x2-c26p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T19:55:09Z"}
